description: MCP configuration for swiss-shopping-mcp project (Copilot CLI)

claude-mem.description: Enhanced memory management and context persistence

additionalMcps.name: gemini-cli
additionalMcps.description: Google Gemini MCP for AI capabilities

setupInstructions.description: Configuration for Copilot CLI (NOT Claude Desktop)
setupInstructions.note: MCPs and plugins are managed via commands in Copilot CLI interactive mode
steps: 2. Install plugins: /plugin install claude-mem context-mode context7 firebase superpowers token-optimizer caveman
setupInstructions.alternativeApproach: MCPs and plugins can also be configured in ~/.copilot/config.json manually, but CLI commands are preferred
